```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

df <- readr::read_tsv(here("figures/marray_rnaseq_up_pathways.tsv"))

# define microarray and RNAseq individual signature columns
microarray_cols <- colnames(df)[2:7]
rnaseq_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df)[2:(ncol(df) - 2)], microarray_cols)

# compute median of individual signatures for each platform
median_micro <- df %>%
  select(all_of(microarray_cols)) %>%
  apply(1, median, na.rm = TRUE)

median_rna <- df %>%
  select(all_of(rnaseq_cols)) %>%
  apply(1, median, na.rm = TRUE)

# compute squared deviation from the median
sq_dev_micro <- (df$aggregated_microarray - median_micro)^2 / length(microarray_cols)
sq_dev_rna <- (df$aggregated_RNAseq - median_rna)^2 / length(rnaseq_cols)

# combine into tidy data frame
plot_df <- tibble(
  Pathway = df$Description,
  Microarray = sq_dev_micro,
  RNAseq = sq_dev_rna
) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Microarray, RNAseq), names_to = "Platform", values_to = "SquaredDeviation")

# boxplot
# compute medians manually
med_labels <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(Platform) %>%
  summarise(SquaredDeviation = median(SquaredDeviation, na.rm = TRUE))

# plot with median labels
ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Platform, y = SquaredDeviation, fill = Platform)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = med_labels,
            aes(x = Platform, y = SquaredDeviation, label = round(SquaredDeviation, 4)),
            vjust = -0.5,
            size = 3,
            color = "black",
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Squared Deviation of Aggregated Signature from Median of Individual Signatures",
    y = "Squared Deviation",
    x = "Platform"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")  # allow text outside panel bounds

```
